nasb.text: The Philistines were afraid, for they said, “God has come into the camp.” And they said, “Woe to us! For nothing like this has happened before.

esv.text: the Philistines were afraid, for they said, “A god has come into the camp.” And they said, “Woe to us! For nothing like this has happened before.

cnv.text: 非利士人就害怕起來，他們說：“有神來到他們的營中了。”又說：“我們有禍了！因為從來沒有這樣的事。

ccb.text: 就害怕起来，说：“有神明到了他们营中，我们大祸临头了，我们从来没有遇过这种事情！
